command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Uptime Kuma container details ==="
docker ps --filter name=uptime --format '{{.Names}} | {{.Image}} | {{.Status}} | {{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Existing monitors (query the sqlite db directly) ==="
# Find the kuma data volume / db
docker inspect uptime-kuma --format '{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}} -> {{.Destination}}{{"\n"}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Is there an API/push setup? Check version ==="
docker exec uptime-kuma cat /app/package.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('version:', d.get('version'))" 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Current monitors in DB ==="
docker exec uptime-kuma sh -c "sqlite3 /app/data/kuma.db 'SELECT id,name,type,url FROM monitor;' 2>/dev/null" 2>/dev/null || echo "cannot query db directly (may need different method)"

echo "=== Web UI reachable? ==="
curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 5 http://localhost:3010 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
